name: @dinilmusick/krnlts
description: The core library for the Krnl ecosystem, providing a uniform syntax and API across JavaScript projects.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/bin/krnlts-watch.ts --dts --format esm,cjs --external ws,zod,zod-to-json-schema && tsup src/krnl/core/K_LIB_Krnl_Frontend_Bridge_Bundle.ts --format iife --global-name KrnlBridge --minify --platform browser --out-dir dist

author: Dinil Palackal
